overall.description: A static cinematic shot from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic harbor with industrial docks in the foreground and a dense cyberpunk skyline across the water. The scene features a prominent red bridge structure, billowing industrial smokestacks, and towering skyscrapers under clear midday skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic harbor with industrial docks and corporate skyline view

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the cyberpunk cityscape from across the harbor

entered.detail: large red structural bridge spanning across the harbor with support beams
tall smokestacks emitting white smoke plumes against the skyline
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with varied architectural designs
low-rise industrial buildings and container structures along the shoreline
murky greenish water filling the foreground of the harbor
large industrial building with red structural elements on the left shore

segments.scene_description: A static panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk harbor, with a prominent red bridge framework spanning the center, industrial smokestacks billowing smoke against a dense skyline of corporate towers in the background, and dock warehouses lining the right shore. The murky harbor water fills the foreground while the camera remains completely stationary throughout the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, wide-angle vista of a futuristic industrial harbor that maintains a constant, imposing perspective of a corporate skyline. It begins with a panoramic view of murky harbor waters in the foreground, framed by the sprawling infrastructure of a cyberpunk port. The gaze is drawn across the center of the frame where a prominent red bridge framework spans the water, while industrial smokestacks billow thick smoke into the air. This industrial foreground then gives way to a dense background of towering corporate skyscrapers that dominate the horizon under a clear sky. The scene remains fixed, allowing the movement of the smoke and the stillness of the dock warehouses to emphasize the scale of the urban landscape.
